name: Corn Meal Muffins
recipeIngredient: 4 tsp Baking Powder (2 ea Large Eggs)
2 tbsp Granuleated Sugar (1/4 c Vegetable Oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease 12 2 1/2-inch muffin cups.
2. Heat oven to 425 degrees F.
3. Sift flour, baking powder, sugar and salt into a medium-sized bowl.
4. Add cornmeal and stir to mix well.
5. In a small bowl, beat eggs with a fork. Add milk and oil. Mix in the dry ingredients.
6. Stir the mixture until the dry ingredients are moistened. The batter will be lumpy.
7. Drop the batter from a tablespoon into the prepared muffin cups, filling each cup 1/2 to 2/3 full.
8. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove and serve hot with butter, bacon, and eggs.
